Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Ben A. Sange, Esq. of Rentschler Tursi, Tel. 650.524.1980, for Plaintiff and moving party;
Jennifer Stanger Poza, Esq. of McNamara Ney Beatty Slattery Borges & Ambacher, Tel. 925.939.5330, for Defendant and opposing party.

The matter was discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling with modificaton. PLAINTIFFS JOSEPH P. HARNEY, AS TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH P. HARNEY TRUST UTD 8/17/05 and WERNER WERWIE's Motion To Amend Complaint is Granted. The trial date of November 13, 2012 is vacated. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
